ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was published */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the article content */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for the article */,
  "hashtags" TEXT /* Comma-separated hashtags for categorization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was added to the platform */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article (e.g., AI, Web3) */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* Number of words in the article */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the main image associated with the article */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Forbes, The Guardian) */,
  "url" TEXT /* Base URL of the source's website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the source */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the source was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the source */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the source's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the hashtag */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hashtag (e.g., AI, Web3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_hashtags" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id", "hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, editor, viewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article involved in the activity */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views for the article */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares for the article */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes for the article */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments for the article */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Calculated engagement score based on views, shares, likes, and comments */,
  "source_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the source based on the quality of the article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
